Class RemoteAccessTokenBuilder<B extends RemoteAccessTokenBuilder<B>>

Type Parameters:

All Implemented Interfaces:
edu.iu.crypt.WebTokenBuilder
public class RemoteAccessTokenBuilder<B extends RemoteAccessTokenBuilder<B>> extends iu.crypt.JwtBuilder<B>
Builds RemoteAccessToken instances.
